title: ceratostylis jacobsonii
intro: Ceratostylis jacobsonii, also known as Jacobson's orchid, is a species of orchid native to Borneo. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Ceratostylis jacobsonii are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome is typically dried and used as an ingredient in traditional remedies, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
